---
description: 'Generate a PRD from project brief'
mode: 'agent'
---

Read the PRD template from `specs/templates/prd-template.md` and the project conventions from `agents.md`. 
Take the user's project brief as input and generate a complete PRD. 
Ensure the problem has numbers, personas are named, metrics are SMART, and scope is clear.
Save the output to `specs/prds/PRD-{feature-name}.md`.
